title: Eiattu pirates

The '''Eiattu pirates''', also known as '''TIE Pirates''', were a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] group of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] who were hiding out on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Radix]] in the [[Abraxas system/Legends|Abraxas system]] in the wake of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. They committed several raids on [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] and convoys that they saw as trespassing in their home [[Star system/Legends|system]] while using Radix as a depot to refuel and rearm their ships.

The group was created in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|debacle at Endor]] and was led by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Harme Kiela]]. A former [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] named [[Kine (pirate)|Kine]] later betrayed the group during a [[Mission to Radix|battle]] between the TIE Pirates and forces of the New Republic.

Following [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian's]] mission to Radix,<ref name="Eiattu pirates">{{JCFCite|temp=yes|url=posts/163443|board=Expanded Universe|thread=BE EXCITED: The Essential Thread to The Essential Guide to Warfare|user=[[Jason Fry|jasonfry]]|date=2012-06-25|nobackup=1}}</ref> the [[New Republic First Fleet|New Republic First Battle Group]] [[Operation on Abraxas|engaged]] the pirates on [[Abraxas]] and destroyed them.<ref name="TEGTW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[Jason Fry]] confirmed on the [[Jedi Council Forums]] that the Eiattu pirates mentioned in ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' are the pirates from [[Lando's Commandos: On Eagles' Wings|Lando's Commandos]] and that the Battle of Abraxas follows [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando's]] [[Mission to Radix|mission]].<ref name="Eiattu pirates" />
